content:
Sure, here is the JSON file extracting for each of the locations in the following caption the name (name), the full address (full_address), and the order (order) in which it was found in the text:

```json
[
  {
    "name": "Scanno",
    "full_address": "Scanno, Abruzzo, Italy",
    "image": "https://www.borghipiubelliditalia.it/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/scanno-abruzzo-italy.jpg",
    "order": 2
  },
  {
    "name": "Abruzzo",
    "full_address": "Abruzzo, Italy",
    "image": "https://www.italyby.it/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/Abruzzo-1-1024x683.jpg",
    "order": 1
  }
]
```

I hope this is helpful!
